'''J1M''', pronounced '''Jaywun-Emm''', was a small, prototype roller-treaded maintenance [[Droid/Legends|droid]].

==Biography==
J1M served aboard [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi's]] personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. His logic circuits were unique, unlike anything previously seen by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] technicians who worked on him. He was a small, tank-like droid with two arms, and a glowing, domed head. On a mission to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], he assisted Ki-Adi-Mundi in his search for [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]]. During the mission, J1M helped Ki expose an illegal arms deal between [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. The droid seemingly fell from the starship's cargo hold and was lost, but this was just a ploy to allow J1M to infiltrate Jabba's shuttle. Once inside the vehicle, J1M downloaded the cargo manifest, revealing that the Trade Federation was in the process of obtaining illegal goods, presumably for their secret army.

==Behind the scenes==
In the first issue of ''Prelude to Rebellion'', this droid is referred to as '''G1M'''.
